name: authentik-pp-mcp
description: Agent-native admin CLI for authentik identity provider with offline SQLite cache and an MCP server for Claude Desktop.

authentik_token.title: AUTHENTIK_TOKEN
authentik_token.description: Sets AUTHENTIK_TOKEN for the authentik MCP server.

authentik_base_url.title: AUTHENTIK_BASE_URL
authentik_base_url.description: Base URL of your authentik instance (e.g. https://authentik.example.com).
